CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Approved") && !ISBLANK( Approved_and_Available_Date__c), Approved_and_Available_Date__c, IF(Waitlist_Position__c = 1 && ISBLANK(Library_Item__r.Expected_Return_Date__c), TODAY(), IF(Waitlist_Position__c = 1 && !ISBLANK(Library_Item__r.Expected_Return_Date__c), Library_Item__r.Expected_Return_Date__c, Library_Item__r.Expected_Return_Date__c + ((Waitlist_Position__c-1)* Library_Item__r.Max_Lending_Time_In_Days__c) )))
CustomField.label: Estimated Available Date
